artifacts.summary: Identified bare sh and sleep references in claude-sleep-inhibitor systemd service (home.nix:813). Fix: replace sh with ${pkgs.bash}/bin/bash, sleep with ${pkgs.coreutils}/bin/sleep inside -c string, add || sleep 5 failure guard.
2-phase implementation plan for markitdown nixpkgs migration
Implementation summary with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Replaced custom markitdown venv wrapper with nixpkgs python312Packages.markitdown. Modified home.nix, flake.nix, deleted packages/markitdown.nix, and updated documentation. Build verification passed.

active_projects.description: Fix R/Python/Quarto environment gaps via Nix wrapper refactor. Replace flat rPackages.* entries in configuration.nix with rWrapper.override containing P0/P1/P2 packages (survival, MASS, nlme, lme4, tidyverse, broom, gtsummary, mice, knitr, rmarkdown, languageserver, styler, lintr); add scipy/statsmodels/scikit-learn/seaborn/pyarrow to home.nix python312.withPackages (scikit-learn requires p.scikit-learn dotted form); add quarto to systemPackages; rebuild and verify. Source report: /home/benjamin/.config/zed/specs/027_fix_task20_env_gaps/reports/01_fix-env-gaps.md

active_projects.blocked_reason: Upstream nixpkgs: jupytext 1.18.1 has 2 failing tests in async/sync ContentsManager sync check. Uncomment jupytext in home.nix when fixed.

Upstream nixpkgs: cucumber-expressions 18.1.0 requires uv_build<0.10.0, nixpkgs ships 0.10.0. Chain: pdf2docx -> python-docx 1.2.0 -> behave -> cucumber-expressions. Uncomment pdf2docx in home.nix when fixed.

artifacts.summary: Research report on laptop thermal optimization for NixOS with AMD Ryzen AI 300

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented laptop thermal optimization by removing cpuFreqGovernor conflict with power-profiles-daemon, disabling GNOME tracker services, configuring LEAN_NUM_THREADS=8, and adding lean/lake to earlyoom prefer pattern. Manual nixos-rebuild switch required to activate.

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented memory management optimizations including disabling systemd-oomd, enabling zram compressed swap with zstd algorithm, and tuning VM parameters for desktop responsiveness. All changes verified through phased rebuilds.
